'''GG-36''' or '''Gigi''' was a [[GG-series hospitality droid]] on [[Telerath/Legends|Telerath]] around [[3963 BBY]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] greeted the disguised [[Jarael]] and [[Gorman Vandrayk|Camper]] upon their arrival and explained the banking [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and its resemblance to a vacation resort.<ref name="KOTOR 11" /> Gigi later got a job working for [[Marn Hierogryph|Gryph's]] [[Goodvalor's Little Bivoli|restaurant]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="KOTOR 47">[[Knights of the Old Republic 47|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 47]]</ref>
